MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: The following questions relate to your usual sleep habits during the past month. Your answers should indicate the most accurate reply for the majority of days and nights in the past month. Please answer all questions.

psqi_1.Description: During the past month, what time have you usually gone to bed at night?

psqi_2.Description: During the past month, how long (in minutes) has it usually taken you to fall asleep each night?

psqi_3.Description: During the past month, what time have you usually gotten up in the morning?

psqi_4.Description: During the past month, how many hours of actual sleep did you get at night? (This may be different than the number of hours you spent in bed.)

psqi_5a.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Cannot get to sleep within 30 minutes

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5b.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Wake up in the middle of the night or early morning

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5c.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Have to get up to use the bathroom

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5d.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Cannot breathe comfortably

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5e.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Cough or snore loudly

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5f.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Feel too cold

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5g.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Feel too hot

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5h.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Had bad dreams

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5i.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble sleeping because you... Have pain

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_5othera.Description: How often during the past month have you had trouble sleeping because of this? Select "Not during the past month" if no other trouble sleeping

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_6.Description: During the past month, how would you rate your sleep quality overall?

Levels.3: Very bad

psqi_7.Description: During the past month, how often have you taken medicine to help you sleep (prescribed or "over the counter")?

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_8.Description: During the past month, how often have you had trouble staying awake while driving, eating meals, or engaging in social activity?

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_9.Description: During the past month, how much of a problem has it been for you to keep up enough enthusiasm to get things done?

Levels.3: A very big problem

psqi_10.Description: Do you have a bed partner or room mate?

Levels.0: No bed partner or room mate
Levels.2: Partner in same room, but not same bed
Levels.3: Partner in same bed

psqi_10a.Description: If you have a room mate or bed partner, ask him/her how often in the past month you have had... Loud snoring

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_10b.Description: If you have a room mate or bed partner, ask him/her how often in the past month you have had... Long pauses between breaths while asleep

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_10c.Description: If you have a room mate or bed partner, ask him/her how often in the past month you have had... Legs twitching or jerking while you sleep

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_10d.Description: If you have a room mate or bed partner, ask him/her how often in the past month you have had... Episodes of disorientation or confusion during sleep

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_10e.Description: If you have a room mate or bed partner, ask him/her how often in the past month you have had... Other restlessness while you sleep; please describe

Levels.3: Three or more times a week

psqi_score_component1.Description: Component 1 - Subjective sleep quality: equals psqi_6 (0 Very good to 3 Very bad).

psqi_score_component2.Description: Component 2 - Sleep latency: psqi_2 (minutes to fall asleep) binned 0-3, plus psqi_5a (0-3); the sum is re-binned (0 / 1-2 / 3-4 / 5-6) to 0-3.

psqi_score_component3.Description: Component 3 - Sleep duration: from psqi_4 (hours slept): >7h=0, 6-7h=1, 4-5h=2, <5h=3.

psqi_score_component4.Description: Component 4 - Habitual sleep efficiency: (hours slept psqi_4 / hours in bed [bedtime psqi_1 to rise time psqi_3]) x 100, binned >85%=0, 75-84%=1, 65-74%=2, <65%=3.
psqi_score_component4.Notes: Manually set to n/a for sub-110354 (implausible reported times).

psqi_score_component5.Description: Component 5 - Sleep disturbances: sum of psqi_5b-psqi_5i and psqi_5othera, binned 0=0, 1-9=1, 10-18=2, 19-27=3.

psqi_score_component6.Description: Component 6 - Use of sleeping medication: equals psqi_7 (0-3).

psqi_score_component7.Description: Component 7 - Daytime dysfunction: psqi_8 + psqi_9, binned 0=0, 1-2=1, 3-4=2, 5-6=3.

psqi_score_global.Description: Global PSQI score: sum of the 7 component scores (range 0-21). n/a if any component is missing.
